title: Diagnose plant health problems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose plant health problems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine factors that influence plant health

pcs.text: Identify the plant species to the lowest taxonomic level, and state its region of origin
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the plant species to the lowest taxonomic level, and state its region of origin?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the plant species to the lowest taxonomic level, and state its region of origin.

pcs.text: Determine plant seasonal growth stages
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine plant seasonal growth stages?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine plant seasonal growth stages.

pcs.text: Record daily cultural practices used on each horticultural species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record daily cultural practices used on each horticultural species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record daily cultural practices used on each horticultural species.

pcs.text: Determine the growing environment characteristics that affect the growth of a specific plant species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the growing environment characteristics that affect the growth of a specific plant species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the growing environment characteristics that affect the growth of a specific plant species.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and cultural factors that predispose plants to attack by pests and diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and cultural factors that predispose plants to attack by pests and diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and cultural factors that predispose plants to attack by pests and diseases.

pcs.text: Record climatic data and environmental growing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record climatic data and environmental growing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record climatic data and environmental growing conditions.

pcs.text: Record the presence or numbers of beneficial organisms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the presence or numbers of beneficial organisms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the presence or numbers of beneficial organisms.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine factors that influence plant health

elements.title: Monitor and diagnose plant health problems

pcs.text: Identify the symptoms and signs of plant health problems using accepted nomenclature
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the symptoms and signs of plant health problems using accepted nomenclature?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the symptoms and signs of plant health problems using accepted nomenclature.

pcs.text: Assess the severity and extent of the problem in a plant species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the severity and extent of the problem in a plant species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the severity and extent of the problem in a plant species.

pcs.text: Compare observations with published data, historical records and own experience
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare observations with published data, historical records and own experience?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare observations with published data, historical records and own experience.

pcs.text: Determine possible causes of the plant health problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine possible causes of the plant health problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine possible causes of the plant health problem.

pcs.text: Consult with specialist services in severe, complex or rapid onset cases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with specialist services in severe, complex or rapid onset cases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with specialist services in severe, complex or rapid onset cases.

pcs.text: Sample plant or soil specimens, and dispatch for specialist diagnosis or laboratory testing where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample plant or soil specimens, and dispatch for specialist diagnosis or laboratory testing where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample plant or soil specimens, and dispatch for specialist diagnosis or laboratory testing where required.

pcs.text: Record and document plant disorders and problems in a report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and document plant disorders and problems in a report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and document plant disorders and problems in a report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor and diagnose plant health problems

elements.title: Remedy plant health problems

pcs.text: Formulate and document a weed, pest and disease control plan according to workplace integrated pest management (IPM) strategy and production plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Formulate and document a weed, pest and disease control plan according to workplace integrated pest management (IPM) strategy and production plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate and document a weed, pest and disease control plan according to workplace integrated pest management (IPM) strategy and production plan requirements.

pcs.text: Identify a range of modifications to growing conditions for a specific situation or plant species to rectify plant health problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a range of modifications to growing conditions for a specific situation or plant species to rectify plant health problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a range of modifications to growing conditions for a specific situation or plant species to rectify plant health problems.

pcs.text: Identify, cost and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for work activities, and analyse benefits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, cost and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for work activities, and analyse benefits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, cost and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for work activities, and analyse benefits.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise environmental impacts of weed, pest and disease control plan according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise environmental impacts of weed, pest and disease control plan according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise environmental impacts of weed, pest and disease control plan according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor plants during treatment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor plants during treatment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare observations and data to expected results.

pcs.text: Recommend control plan modifications to client or management

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend control plan modifications to client or management.

pcs.text: Document and present control plan report to client or management

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and present control plan report to client or management.
